low_issues.issue: allow_external_api=false is not independently enforced if safe_mode is manually disabled.
Dashboard status check can wait for local Ollama timeout when Ollama is unavailable.
_safe_fetch catches broad exceptions for optional context tables.

recommended_next_steps: Enforce allow_external_api=false independently of safe_mode for non-localhost endpoints.
Narrow _safe_fetch to known missing-table errors and log warnings.
Optionally cache Local AI status in the dashboard to reduce unavailable-endpoint delay.
Run a real local memo smoke test after starting Ollama and pulling llama3.1:8b or qwen2.5:7b.
